// ==== __DwarfRegistry_Src.g.cs ====
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable
namespace Demo
{
    public static class __DwarfRegistry_Src
    {
        public static TTarget MapTo<TTarget>(this global::Demo.Src source)
        {
            if (source is null) throw new global::System.ArgumentNullException(nameof(source));
            if (typeof(TTarget) == typeof(global::Demo.Dto)) return (TTarget)(object)ToDto(source);
            throw new global::System.NotSupportedException("No [MapTo] mapping from global::Demo.Src to " + typeof(TTarget).FullName + ".");
        }

        public static global::Demo.Dto ToDto(this global::Demo.Src source)
        {
            if (source is null) throw new global::System.ArgumentNullException(nameof(source));
            return new global::Demo.Dto
            {
                Id = source.Id,
                Name = source.Name,
            };
        }
    }
}
